name: African Vegetarian Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 small Kohlrabies, peeled and cut into chunks
2 Sweet Potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Lower the heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
4. Note: Serve couscous separately if desired. Parsnips may be substituted for kohlrabi.
